creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ulrich Spörlein from comment #3)

Thanks Ulrich.

Everything works as expected except the label: the label does exist, but it seems I am unable to apply it to any pull request. I guess I lack the necessary privileges, and probably the same also holds for the other members of status@.

This would not be a big deal probably if we could activate the GitHub action called Labeler (see comment #1): if it is possible to have it adding the "status report" label to any pull request that affects files in website/content/en/status (recursively), then it should not be necessary to increase anyone's privileges.
